headline: Quality is not an act, it's a habit.
paragraphs: Fresh MCA graduate (2025) with real internship experience at Doveriye, where I was the sole technical contributor on a Python-based AI Call RAG System — and simultaneously responsible for manual test execution and bug documentation on the same product. Alongside the internship, I've built a portfolio of QA projects covering automation, manual testing, API validation, and accessibility auditing.

My approach is systematic and evidence-driven. I design test cases that expose real vulnerabilities — from JWT session persistence bugs to WebSocket zombie connections — build Selenium frameworks using POM architecture, and document findings clearly enough that developers can act on them without back-and-forth.

highlights.label: Domain
highlights.value: Web Apps · REST APIs · AI Systems
